description_long: This is a large, cylindrical red metal barrel with a weathered and stained surface, featuring dark streaks and patches of grime. The barrel has two prominent horizontal reinforcement bands encircling its body, giving it structural rigidity. On one side, there is a clear hazardous material label with the word 'CORROSIVE' and the code 'UN 1719', indicating it is used for storing dangerous substances. The top of the barrel is sealed with a fitted lid, which has two round bungs or caps for filling and emptying contents. Some areas of the barrel display greenish stains, possibly from chemical spills or graffiti. The overall appearance suggests it is an industrial container, likely found in urban or warehouse environments.
description: A weathered red metal barrel with reinforcement bands, corrosion warning label, and sealed lid with two bungs. Stained and marked, it appears suited for industrial or hazardous material storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing green stains and partial view of the hazardous label, with both bungs on the lid visible.
description_view_1: Side view with fewer markings, showing the red surface and reinforcement bands, and a hint of green discoloration.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal markings, mostly showing the red, weathered metal and structural bands.
description_view_3: View highlighting the 'CORROSIVE' label and UN 1719 code, with the lid and both bungs visible.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: corrosive warning label, UN 1719, green stains, black streaks
